programs.name: PJM Interconnection Demand Response
programs.notes: PJM's emergency and economic demand response programs. Industrial and commercial facilities can earn capacity payments for load curtailment.

programs.name: CAISO Demand Response
programs.notes: California ISO demand response programs. Available through utilities and aggregators. Industrial loads of 100kW+ qualify.

programs.name: Eversource Demand Response MA
programs.notes: Commercial demand response program paying $50–$150/kW-year for summer peak load curtailment.

programs.name: Con Edison Demand Management
programs.notes: Peak load management programs for NYC commercial and industrial accounts. Includes both voluntary and automated demand response options.

programs.name: NYISO Demand Response Programs
programs.notes: NY's DMNC, SCR, and EDRP programs pay facilities to reduce load during peak events. Payments range from $50–$500/kW-year.

programs.name: ERCOT Demand Response (Texas)
programs.notes: ERCOT load participation programs for large C&I customers. Payments tied to real-time energy market prices during scarcity events.

programs.name: APS Business VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Arizona largest utility. Strong VFD rebates for cooling-heavy applications like chilled water pumps.

programs.name: ENERGY STAR Rebate Finder
programs.notes: Rebate · Commercial · max: Varies

programs.name: PG&E VFD / Motor Drive Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Highest VFD rebates in the US. Calculated incentives available via custom pathway. Pre-approval required for projects over $50,000.

programs.name: SCE VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: LA/Southern CA. Prescriptive and calculated pathways. Custom M&V path for large industrial VFD projects.

programs.name: Xcel Energy VFD Rebates (CO/MN)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Rebate calculated by end-use: HVAC fan, chilled water pump, cooling tower fan, industrial, data center fan. Applies in CO and MN service territories.

programs.name: CT Eversource VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Connecticut prescriptive VFD rebate. Applies to HVAC and process load motors.

programs.name: DC SEU VFD / Motor Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Washington DC. ECM circulator pump and VFD rebates for commercial and multifamily buildings.

programs.name: Georgia Power Business VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Prescriptive rebates for VFDs on HVAC fans and pumps. Custom path for industrial process loads.

programs.name: Ameren Illinois VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Serves downstate Illinois. Prescriptive VFD rebates for HVAC and industrial applications.

programs.name: ComEd VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Prescriptive rebates for VFDs on HVAC pumps, cooling tower fans, process loads. Pre-approval required for projects over $25,000.

programs.name: MassSave VFD / Motor Drive Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Prescriptive rebate. VFDs on pumps, fans, compressors. Rate varies by HP: 1–5 HP=$50/HP, 6–50 HP=$100/HP, 51+ HP=$150–$200/HP. No pre-approval for prescriptive path.

programs.name: Consumers Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Michigan utility with 30+ VFD rebate categories. Schedule energy consultation first.

programs.name: DTE Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Detroit metro. Prescriptive VFD rebates for commercial and industrial motor applications.

programs.name: Duke Energy NC VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Prescriptive path for VFDs on HVAC and process loads. Custom path for larger systems.

programs.name: PSE&G NJ VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: NJ largest utility. Prescriptive path for standard VFD sizes. Custom path for large industrial projects.

programs.name: NV Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Las Vegas metro. Strong VFD rebates for cooling tower fans and chilled water pumps.

programs.name: NYSERDA FlexTech VFD Feasibility Study
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Pays 50% of engineering/feasibility study cost for VFD projects. Use this before installation to reduce engineering spend.

programs.name: National Grid NY VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Prescriptive rebate for VFDs on HVAC fans, pumps, and process loads. Apply within 90 days of installation.

programs.name: Portland General Electric VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Oregon prescriptive VFD rebates. Custom path available through Energy Trust of Oregon.

programs.name: FirstEnergy PA VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Apply within 180 days of project completion. Pre-approval required. Utility retains PJM capacity rights.

programs.name: PECO Smart Ideas VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Philadelphia metro. Prescriptive and custom paths. Pre-approval required for custom projects.

programs.name: PPL Electric VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Online savings calculator available. VFDs must be new installations on existing equipment.

programs.name: TVA EnergyRight VSD / VFD Incentive
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: TVA serves TN, AL, KY, MS, parts of GA, NC, VA. $100/HP for VSDs on existing HVAC equipment. Pre-approval required. Applies to fans, pumps, compressors.

programs.name: CPS Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: San Antonio metro. VFD rebates for HVAC and process equipment.

programs.name: Efficiency Vermont VFD Contractor Incentive
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: $10/HP pre-installation + $20/HP post-installation. VFD must be controlled by automatic signal. Replacing existing VFDs not eligible.

programs.name: Puget Sound Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Washington state. Prescriptive VFD rebates for HVAC and industrial applications.

programs.name: Focus on Energy VFD Rebates
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with federal tax credits and state grants
programs.notes: Statewide Wisconsin program. No pre-approval required for prescriptive measures. Custom path available.

programs.name: EDA Manufacturing Modernization Grants
programs.notes: Grant · Manufacturing · max: Varies

programs.name: EPA Clean Air Act Section 138 Grants
programs.notes: Grant · Industrial, Combustion · max: Varies

programs.name: USDA REAP — VFD on Agricultural / Rural Equipment
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with utility rebates and tax credits
programs.notes: VFDs on irrigation pumps, grain dryers, and rural facility HVAC are primary REAP applications. 25% direct grant + 75% guaranteed loan. Can stack with utility rebate for 40–60% net project cost reduction.

programs.name: USDA Rural Energy for America (REAP)
programs.notes: Grant + Loan · Rural Commercial, Agricultural · max: $1,000,000

programs.name: DOE Better Buildings Financing Navigator
programs.notes: Financing Navigator · Commercial, Industrial · max: Varies

programs.name: Nuveen C-PACE
programs.max: No cap (typically up to 25% of property value)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.name: PACE Nation State Programs Directory
programs.max: No cap (typically up to 25% of property value)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.name: Petros PACE Finance
programs.max: No cap (typically up to 25% of property value)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.name: SBA 504 Loan Program (Green)
programs.notes: Below-market loan · Small Business · max: $5,500,000

programs.name: SBA 7(a) Equipment Financing
programs.notes: Loan Guarantee · Small Business · max: $5,000,000

programs.name: USDA Business & Industry Loan Guarantee
programs.notes: Loan Guarantee · Rural Commercial, Industrial · max: $25,000,000

programs.name: CA Infrastructure Bank (IBank) CLEEN
programs.notes: Low-interest loan for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.max: No cap (typically up to 25% of property value)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks with grants and tax credits
programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.notes: Loan / PACE for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: PACE + Loan for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.notes: Loan for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: Loan + Grant for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: Loan for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: Loan / Grant for clean energy and efficiency projects. Green banks offer favorable terms not available through conventional lenders.

programs.notes: C-PACE finances energy efficiency, renewable energy, and water upgrades through property tax assessment. No upfront cost. 5–30 year terms. Transfers with property sale.

programs.name: NIST MEP Manufacturing Extension Partnership
programs.notes: Technical Assistance + Cost Share · Manufacturing · max: 50% cost share

programs.name: 48C Advanced Energy Project Tax Credit
programs.notes: Tax Credit · Industrial, Manufacturing · max: No cap

programs.name: Bonus Depreciation (MACRS) for Energy Equipment
programs.notes: Accelerated Depreciation · Commercial, Industrial · max: No cap

programs.name: Bonus Depreciation — VFD Equipment (MACRS)
programs.stack: Yes — stacks on top of utility rebates
programs.notes: VFD equipment qualifies for MACRS bonus depreciation: 60% in 2024, 40% in 2025, 20% in 2026. Phases out 2027. Rebate received from utility reduces the depreciable basis.

programs.name: IRA Battery Storage Tax Credit (48)
programs.notes: Tax Credit · Commercial, Industrial · max: No cap

programs.name: IRA Section 48 ITC — VFD on Industrial Equipment
programs.notes: VFDs on industrial pumps, fans, and compressors qualify as energy efficiency property under IRA Section 48. 30% tax credit on installed cost. Bonus credits available for domestic content and energy communities.

programs.name: IRA Section 48 Investment Tax Credit
programs.notes: Tax Credit · Commercial, Industrial · max: No cap

programs.name: Section 179D Commercial Buildings Deduction
programs.notes: Tax Deduction · Commercial · max: Varies by sq ft

programs.name: DOE Advanced Manufacturing Office Assessments
programs.notes: Free Assessment · Manufacturing · max: Free

programs.name: DOE CHP Technical Assistance Partnerships
programs.notes: Technical Assistance · Industrial, Commercial · max: Free

programs.name: DOE EERE Industrial Efficiency
programs.notes: Technical Assistance · Industrial · max: Free

programs.name: EPA Clean Water State Revolving Fund
programs.notes: Low-interest loan · Municipal, Industrial · max: No cap

programs.name: EPA WaterSense Commercial Rebates
programs.notes: Rebate · Commercial · max: Varies

programs.name: USDA Water & Environmental Programs
programs.notes: Grant + Loan · Rural, Municipal · max: Varies

programs.name: CA DWR Water Efficiency Grants
programs.notes: Grants for water recycling, efficiency, and conservation projects.

programs.name: Metropolitan Water District Conservation Rebates
programs.notes: Rebates for commercial water efficiency equipment including cooling tower controls and efficient irrigation.

programs.name: Denver Water Conservation Rebates
programs.notes: Commercial rebates for water-efficient equipment.

programs.name: NY Environmental Facilities Corp Water Loans
programs.notes: Below-market financing for water and wastewater infrastructure improvements.

programs.name: TX TWDB Water Conservation Loans
programs.notes: SWIFT and CWSRF loans for water system efficiency and conservation infrastructure.
